text:
Eliza (エリザ, Eriza) is one of Neon Nostrade's personal attendants. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 72 She was also in a romantic relationship with Squala, one of Neon's bodyguards, until his death. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 12, Chapter 112 

Appearance

 
|-|2011 Anime=
 
Eliza 2011 Full Body Design.png
 
|-|1999 Anime=
 
Eliza 1999.png
 
|-|Manga=
 
Eliza 67.png
 
 

Eliza has long, wavy, violet hair, and purple eyes. She's always seen wearing a dark kimono. She is usually following and accompanying Neon. 

Personality

Eliza is a very calm and patient person. Though she occasionally becomes agitated at Neon, Eliza seems to care for her sincerely.

Plot

Yorknew City arc

At the Nostrade's Mansion, Eliza and another attendant stand beside Dalzollene as he screens potential Nostrade bodyguards. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 67 When Kurapika, Melody, Baise, and Basho all collected the necessary items to be hired, she and the other attendant take away the items. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 70 

On the night of September 1 st , Eliza is seen playing a card game with Neon. After Neon's temper tantrum, Eliza and the other attendant clean up the mess Neon left behind. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 73 With the news that the Underground Auction items have been stolen by some unknown assailants, Squala orders Eliza and the other attendant to stay behind with Neon and not let anyone see her. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 74 

Along with Melody and Basho, Eliza and the other attendant assist Neon during her shopping spree at Lingon Airport. After Basho notices that Neon is taking her time in the bathroom, Eliza goes to check on her and finds that she isn't there. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 94 After the events of the Underground Auction, the same group goes shopping again while Squala and his dogs protect the Scarlet Eyes back at the Hotel Beitacle. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 12, Chapter 109 

Greed Island arc

Melody tells Kurapika that Eliza was overcome with grief after Squala's death since the two were in love. She adds that Neon was more upset over Eliza than the Scarlet Eyes being taken and agreed that it would be best to return home. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 121
